metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for 999online developers.

plugins.name: web-scaffold
plugins.description: Agentic web project scaffolding on incubation architecture standards — discover idea, pick lightest credible golden path (landing / full-stack / internal tool / API service), approve ADR, scaffold via official scaffolders (stubs only, zero feature code — feature work happens inside generated project), verify structurally against decision standard. Cloudflare-default; full-stack paths scaffold a Turborepo monorepo (apps/web + apps/api + packages/db). Strict structure contract + guard hooks enforced in generated projects.

plugins.name: mobile-scaffold
plugins.description: Agentic mobile app scaffolding on incubation architecture standards — pick a profile (target mobile-only/+web × size small/large), approve an ADR, scaffold separate git repos (Expo mobile + backend: Hono+Workers+D1 small / NestJS+Postgres/AWS large, plus a react-native-web app when +web) via official scaffolders (stubs only, zero feature code — feature work happens inside generated repos), verify each. Expo + Cloudflare highest priority; Firebase for notifications. Strict structure contract enforced per repo.

plugins.name: idea-incubation-review
plugins.description: Initial research + viability verdict for a raw idea against 999's internal incubation criteria — fan out three analysts (buildability, market/adoption, business), then score against the Pre-Presentation Rulebook (20-item) and the Idea Incubation Operating Model (page-09/10 scorecard) with a software-first hard gate. Answers buildable-per-docs? and viable-per-rulebook?, classifies Commercial vs Internal track, lists gaps and missing presenter deliverables. Works with zero setup; a connected Confluence-reader MCP freshens criteria and flags drift.

plugins.name: idea-scout
plugins.description: Generate sellable software ideas grounded in real web evidence, then loop each through the idea-incubation-review gate until 5 pass READY. Fans out four generation analysts (trend, demand, whitespace, monetization) that cite sources, dedupes against a persistent ledger of every idea ever proposed, and auto-refines a REFINE candidate once. Every proposed idea carries source URLs for why it was picked. Optional CurrentsAPI news MCP (set up via /init-mcp) grounds what's selling today; falls back to WebSearch. Requires the idea-incubation-review plugin installed. Use when you want fresh, market-validated software ideas rather than judging one idea you already have.
